title: Deepslate Titan Boss
description: A datapack that adds a new boss : the Deepslate Titan
body:
# Deepslate Titan Boss

## Fortified Town
The Fortified Town is a new structure that generates in plain biomes. A lot of interesting loot can be found there.


## Deepslate Titan
### Summoning
Once you found a fortified town, go in the basement of the main house. You will find a sleeping Deepslate titan there. 

You then need to craft the **Heart of the Earth**:

![Heart of the Earth crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c74cfb82ccfeb3e70cb672f847b0fe1b3e687864.png)

Use it on the sleeping titan to wake it up.


### Abilities
The Deepslate Titan can use several custom attacks:
- A basic punch attack
- A jump attack where the boss deals damage upon landing
- A spin attack where the titan spins its arms, damaging everything around it
- A spike attack where tit summons deepslate spikes under the players
- A boulder attack where it throws a deepslate boulder
- It also summons **Deepslate Golems** to assist it

### Reward
Upon death, the Deepslate drops around 50 levels of exp and the **Deepslate Sword**.
## Deepslate Sword
The Deepslate Sword deals more damage than a netherite sword.

It allows you to summon damaging deepslate spikes.
